text: WarMonitor I probably would too. Some attendees grabbed bottles of alcohol from dinner tables while being escorted out of the White House Correspondents’ Dinner following the shooting - NBC - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我可能也会这么做。在白宫记者协会晚宴发生枪击事件后，一些与会者在被护送离开时从餐桌上拿走了酒瓶 - NBC - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - The suspect was armed with a shotgun, a handgun and multiple knives, he was not struck by gunfire but did exchange shots with an officer who was struck, police believe the suspect was a guest at the hotel where the dinner was being held. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048245436897485006/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 嫌疑人携带了一把霰弹枪、一把手枪和多把刀具，他没有被枪击中，但与一名警察发生了交火，该警察被击中。警方认为嫌疑人是举办晚宴的酒店的住客。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048245436897485006/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel WHCA shooting suspect Cole Tomas Allen has been charged with two counts of using a firearm during a crime of violence and assault on a federal officer with a dangerous weapon, Jeanine Pirro says. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048243012908564901/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Jeanine Pirro 表示，白宫记者协会晚宴枪击案嫌疑人 Cole Tomas Allen 已被控两项罪名：在暴力犯罪中使用枪支，以及使用危险武器袭击联邦官员。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048243012908564901/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Authorities say the shooter was armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives. An exchange of gunfire did take place, and they believe he was registered as a hotel guest, suggesting the room was booked well in advance. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048242922290589902/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 当局称枪手携带了一把霰弹枪、一把手枪和多把刀具。确实发生了交火，他们认为他是登记在册的酒店住客，这表明房间是提前预订的。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048242922290589902/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump describes the first moments after the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, saying First Lady Melania knew “immediately what happened.” @RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048242635408633975/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统描述了白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件发生后的最初时刻，称第一夫人梅拉尼娅“立刻知道发生了什么”。@RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048242635408633975/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The shooter at the WHCD dinner was not struck by gunfire or injured -DC Chief of Police Carroll One Secret Service officer was hit in the vest and is OK. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 华盛顿特区警察局长 Carroll 表示，白宫记者协会晚宴的枪手没有被枪击中或受伤。一名特勤局特工被击中防弹背心，目前状况良好。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 Clear photo of the WHCD shooter. The suspect is 31 year old, Cole Tomas Allen, from Torrance, California. He worked as a teacher in California and won the C2 Education of Torrance Teacher of the Month Award in December 2024. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Media crews are gathering outside the home of White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting suspect Cole Tomas Allen. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 白宫记者协会晚宴枪手的清晰照片。嫌疑人是 31 岁的 Cole Tomas Allen，来自加利福尼亚州托伦斯。他曾在加州担任教师，并于 2024 年 12 月获得了 C2 Education of Torrance 月度教师奖。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 媒体工作人员正聚集在白宫记者协会晚宴枪击案嫌疑人 Cole Tomas Allen 的住所外。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Washington D.C. Police report that the shooter, now identified as Cole Tomas Allen from Torrence, California, was armed with both a shotgun, handgun, and several knives. "Thank you, Madam Mayor. Again, I'm Jeff Carroll, Interim Chief of Police for the Metropolitan Police Department. This afternoon, this evening, members of the United States Secret Service and the Metropolitan Police Department were here at the Washington Hotel for a site detail for the Correspondence Centre. As the Mayor mentioned, at approximately 8.36 tonight, an individual charged a U.S. Secret Service checkpoint here in the lobby area of the hotel. He was armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives. As he ran through that checkpoint, members of law enforcement from the United States Secret Service intercepted that individual. This is a very preliminary investigation at this point. We do know that law enforcement exchanged gunfire with the individual. We do know that a U.S. Secret Service Unicorn Division officer was struck in his vest. He was transported to a local hospital for treatment. He seems to be in good spirits at this time. The suspect in this case, he was not struck by gunfire. However, he was transported to a local hospital to be evaluated." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 华盛顿特区警方报告称，枪手现已确认为来自加利福尼亚州托伦斯的 Cole Tomas Allen，他携带了霰弹枪、手枪和几把刀具。“谢谢市长女士。再次重申，我是 Jeff Carroll，大都会警察局代理局长。今天下午，今晚，美国特勤局和大都会警察局的成员在这里的华盛顿酒店为记者中心进行现场安保。正如市长所提到的，今晚大约 8 点 36 分，一名个人冲向了酒店大堂区域的美国特勤局检查站。他携带了霰弹枪、手枪和多把刀具。当他冲过检查站时，美国特勤局的执法人员拦截了该个人。目前这还是一项非常初步的调查。我们确实知道执法人员与该个人发生了交火。我们确实知道一名美国特勤局制服部门的警官被击中了防弹背心。他已被送往当地医院接受治疗。他目前精神状态良好。本案中的嫌疑人没有被枪击中。不过，他已被送往当地医院进行评估。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump releases up-close photos of shooter at WHCD. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Clear photo of the WHCD shooter. The suspect is 31 year old, Cole Tomas Allen, from Torrance, California. He worked as a teacher in California and won the C2 Education of Torrance Teacher of the Month Award in December 2024. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普发布了白宫记者协会晚宴枪手的近距离照片。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 白宫记者协会晚宴枪手的清晰照片。嫌疑人是 31 岁的 Cole Tomas Allen，来自加利福尼亚州托伦斯。他曾在加州担任教师，并于 2024 年 12 月获得了 C2 Education of Torrance 月度教师奖。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump: I don’t want to say this, but this is why we have to have all the attributes of what we’re planning at the White House. We need the ballroom. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普：我不想这么说，但这就是为什么我们必须在白宫拥有我们计划的所有属性。我们需要宴会厅。🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. President Trump's address following the WHCD shooting has ended. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYP: A volunteer at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner said a suspected gunman appeared to assemble a 'long' weapon in a lightly monitored area near the terrace-level entrance before opening fire and rushing toward the ballroom. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普在白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件后的讲话已经结束。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 纽约邮报：白宫记者协会晚宴的一名志愿者称，一名疑似枪手似乎在露台入口附近一个监控较少的区域组装了一件“长”武器，然后开火并冲向宴会厅。@wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NOW - U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro says White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooter Cole Allen, a 31-year-old California teacher, is being charged with two counts: Using a firearm during a crime of violence, and assault on a federal officer using a dangerous weapon. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048240396019335325/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 美国检察官 Jeanine Pirro 表示，白宫记者协会晚宴枪手、31 岁的加州教师 Cole Allen 被控两项罪名：在暴力犯罪中使用枪支，以及使用危险武器袭击联邦官员。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048240396019335325/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor New details on the shooter have been released, along with footage of him on the ground, followed by CCTV showing agents moving in and taking him down. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048239588829794816/video/1 tweet

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says he has studied assassinations and "The people that do the most, the people that make the biggest impact, they're the ones that they go after." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048239269659988018/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普表示他研究过暗杀事件，“那些做得最多的人，那些产生最大影响的人，就是他们针对的目标。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048239269659988018/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump said authorities believe it was a “lone wolf” shooter and that he doesn’t think it was tied to the war with Iran. He also praised security, saying it had the area secured. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048237693721604586/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普表示，当局认为这是一名“独狼”枪手，他不认为这与伊朗战争有关。他还称赞了安保工作，称该区域已得到保护。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048237693721604586/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The White House presser on tonight’s shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner has now ended. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048237114546958432/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 关于今晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件的白宫新闻发布会现已结束。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048237114546958432/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that it’s unlikely tonight’s shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner had anything to do with the war against Iran. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048236819792212344/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的枪击事件不太可能与对伊朗的战争有任何关系。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048236819792212344/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says "A man charged a security checkpoint armed with multiple weapons," Secret Service and law enforcement stopped the suspect, have him in custody, and searching his apartment is underway, one officer was shot at close range and saved by a bulletproof vest. tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普说：“一名男子携带多种武器冲向安全检查站，”特勤局和执法部门阻止了嫌疑人，已将其拘留，并正在搜查他的公寓，一名警官在近距离被枪击，幸亏有防弹背心救了一命。推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Capitol Police have released a statement: The Members of Congress who attended the White House Correspondents’ Dinner are safe and secure. We are assisting our federal and local partners with anything they need. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048235861741826559/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国国会警察发表声明：出席白宫记者协会晚宴的国会议员们安全无恙。我们正在协助我们的联邦和地方合作伙伴处理他们需要的任何事情。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048235861741826559/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has responded to the shooting at tonight’s White House Correspondents Dinner, saying he is “Relieved to know that President Trump, the First Lady, and other attendees are safe.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048235442785366209/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫对今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的枪击事件作出回应，称他“得知特朗普总统、第一夫人和其他与会者平安无事，感到宽慰。” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048235442785366209/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Per U.S. President Donald J. Trump, the shooter at tonight’s White House Correspondents Dinner was likely a lone actor. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048234761194287546/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的枪手很可能是一名单独行动者。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048234761194287546/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, no motive has yet been determined for the shooter, Cole Thomas Allen, at tonight’s White House Correspondents Dinner. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048233994412568578/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，目前尚未确定今晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪手 Cole Thomas Allen 的动机。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048233994412568578/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Kash Patel likely sees this as a chance to hold onto his position, following reports of ongoing White House rumors that he could be replaced. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048233296786596350/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor Kash Patel 可能认为这是一个保住职位的机会，此前有报道称白宫内部传言他可能会被替换。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048233296786596350/video/1 推文

text: The suspect in the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting was armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives. He was not struck by gunfire.
text_zh: 白宫记者协会晚宴的枪击嫌疑人携带了一把霰弹枪、一把手枪和多把刀具。他没有被枪击中。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump posts close-up photos of White House Correspondents’ Dinner attacker." A 31-year-old California teacher, Cole Allen, was identified as the gunman who opened fire near the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, D.C. Source: New York Post
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普发布了白宫记者协会晚宴袭击者的特写照片。”一名31岁的加州教师科尔·艾伦（Cole Allen）被确认为在华盛顿特区白宫记者协会晚宴附近开枪的枪手。来源：纽约邮报

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸🇮🇱⚡️🇮🇷 Within a hours, expect Zionist accusations that Iran is behind the shooting." Reporter: Is there any indication that this shooting could have been linked to war in Iran? Trump: I don’t think so, but you never know.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸🇮🇱⚡️🇮🇷 预计几小时内，犹太复国主义者会指责伊朗是此次枪击事件的幕后黑手。”记者：是否有迹象表明这次枪击事件可能与伊朗战争有关？特朗普：我不这么认为，但你永远不知道。

text: Trump, randomly: We can’t let Iran get a nuclear weapon—everything will be peanuts compared to that.
text_zh: 特朗普，随口说道：我们不能让伊朗拥有核武器——相比之下，其他一切都微不足道。

text: Trump: You know, I tell the story—race car drivers, I think it’s very dangerous. So if you take 1% and then take about 10% of 1%, just to break it down very easily, they die. So, much less than 1%—10% of 1%. I think bull riding is very dangerous. If you take about the same—10% of 1%—much less than 1%. But if you take presidents, it’s 5.8%, and about 8% are shot at.
text_zh: 特朗普：你知道，我讲过这个故事——赛车手，我认为这非常危险。所以如果你取1%，然后再取1%的10%，简单来说，他们就会死亡。所以，远低于1%——1%的10%。我认为骑牛非常危险。如果你取同样的比例——1%的10%——远低于1%。但如果你看总统，比例是5.8%，大约8%的人被枪击过。

text: Trump: This is not going to deter me from winning the war in Iran. I don’t know if that has anything to do with this; I really don’t think so, based on what we know.
text_zh: 特朗普：这不会阻止我赢得对伊朗的战争。我不知道这是否与此事有关；根据我们所知，我真的不这么认为。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 🇮🇷U.S. President Trump reassured that the shooting will not deter him from winning the war with Iran. "And it's not gonna deter me from winning the war in Iran" @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump's address following the WHCD shooting has ended. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 🇮🇷美国总统特朗普重申，枪击事件不会阻止他赢得对伊朗的战争。“这不会阻止我赢得对伊朗的战争” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普在白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件后的讲话已经结束。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on how this event will impact his life: "The pretty normal life considering, you know, it's a dangerous life. I think I'm I think I handled it as well as as well as it can be handled. I think a lot of other people you know, you…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reassured that the shooting will not deter him from winning the war with Iran. "And it's not gonna deter me from winning the war in Iran" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈到这一事件将如何影响他的生活：“考虑到这是一种危险的生活，这算是相当正常的生活。我想我处理得尽可能好了。我想很多人，你知道，你……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普重申，枪击事件不会阻止他赢得对伊朗的战争。“这不会阻止我赢得对伊朗的战争” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on if political violence is part of contemporary U.S. politics: "We're not the only country. You look at this great violence with all countries. I was talking to somebody from another country today. And they have numerous assassinations…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on how this event will impact his life: "The pretty normal life considering, you know, it's a dangerous life. I think I'm I think I handled it as well as as well as it can be handled. I think a lot of other people you know, you read stories where they become basket cases, to be honest with you. I'm not a basket case." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及政治暴力是否是当代美国政治的一部分时表示：‘我们不是唯一的国家。看看所有国家发生的这种巨大暴力事件。我今天和另一个国家的人谈过。他们有无数次暗杀……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及此事将如何影响他的生活时表示：“考虑到这一点，生活还算正常，你知道，这是一种危险的生活。我想我处理得尽可能好了。老实说，你读过很多关于其他人变成精神崩溃者的故事。我不是一个精神崩溃者。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: My impression is that he was a lone wolf, a whackjob. These are crazy people, and they have to be dealt with.
text_zh: 特朗普：我的印象是他是一个独狼，一个疯子。这些人是疯子，必须处理掉他们。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump doesn't think the shooting at the White House Correspondents dinner was linked to the war in Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普认为白宫记者协会晚宴上的枪击事件与伊朗战争无关。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump described being the President as the most dangerous profession. "It's a dangerous profession. But don't view it that way. Look. I'm here to do a job. It's part of the job." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on if political violence is part of contemporary U.S. politics: "We're not the only country. You look at this great violence with all countries. I was talking to somebody from another country today. And they have numerous assassinations of political figures. All over the world. You look at South America and South America, it's, like, some of the numbers are just terrific. It's dangerous. It's dangerous stuff. Whether it's here or someplace else, no country is immune." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普称总统是世界上最危险的职业。‘这是一个危险的职业。但不要那样看。听着，我来这里是为了工作。这是工作的一部分。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈及政治暴力是否是当代美国政治的一部分时表示：‘我们不是唯一的国家。看看所有国家发生的这种巨大暴力事件。我今天和另一个国家的人谈过。他们有无数次针对政治人物的暗杀。全世界都是如此。看看南美洲，有些数字简直惊人。这很危险。这是危险的事情。无论是在这里还是在其他地方，没有哪个国家能幸免。’ @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Is there any indication that this shooting could have been linked to war in Iran? Trump: I don’t think so, but you never know.
text_zh: 记者：是否有任何迹象表明这次枪击事件可能与伊朗战争有关？特朗普：我不这么认为，但你永远不知道。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says the Washington Hilton Hotel is not a "particularly safe building" and then plugs his ballroom a little. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普称华盛顿希尔顿酒店不是一个“特别安全的建筑”，然后稍微推销了一下他的宴会厅。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump assess that the shooter was a lone wolf. "My impression is he was a lone wolf. Whack job. These are crazy people. These are crazy people. And they have to be dealt with." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump described being the President as the most dangerous profession. "It's a dangerous profession. But don't view it that way. Look. I'm here to do a job. It's part of the job." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普评估枪手为独狼。‘我的印象是他是一个独狼。疯子。这些人是疯子。这些人是疯子。必须处理掉他们。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普称总统是世界上最危险的职业。‘这是一个危险的职业。但不要那样看。听着，我来这里是为了工作。这是工作的一部分。’ @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Do you believe you were the target? Trump: I guess, these people are crazy; you never know.
text_zh: 记者：你认为你是目标吗？特朗普：我想是吧，这些人疯了；你永远不知道。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on if the shooting was connected to the conflict with Iran: Reporter: "Is there any indication that this shooting could have been linked to war in Iran." Trump: "I don't think so. But you never know." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump assess that the shooter was a lone wolf. "My impression is he was a lone wolf. Whack job. These are crazy people. These are crazy people. And they have to be dealt with." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及枪击事件是否与伊朗冲突有关：记者：‘是否有任何迹象表明这次枪击事件可能与伊朗战争有关。’ 特朗普：‘我不这么认为。但你永远不知道。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普评估枪手为独狼。‘我的印象是他是一个独狼。疯子。这些人是疯子。这些人是疯子。必须处理掉他们。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: The room was very, very secure. He charged from 50 yards away. He was very far away from the room.
text_zh: 特朗普：房间非常、非常安全。他从50码外冲过来。他离房间非常远。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump says that security personnel had their guns drawn as the shooter presented a threat. "those guys, they had their guns drawn literally by the time he was there. They were shooting. That's right. They were very impressive. I thought…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on if the shooting was connected to the conflict with Iran: Reporter: "Is there any indication that this shooting could have been linked to war in Iran." Trump: "I don't think so. But you never know." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，当枪手构成威胁时，安保人员已经拔出了枪。‘那些家伙，在他到达那里时，他们确实已经拔出了枪。他们在射击。没错。他们非常令人印象深刻。我以为……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及枪击事件是否与伊朗冲突有关：记者：‘是否有任何迹象表明这次枪击事件可能与伊朗战争有关。’ 特朗普：‘我不这么认为。但你永远不知道。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump confirmed that the shooter is a man that lives in California. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普证实枪手是一名居住在加利福尼亚州的男子。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Reporter: Why do you think this keeps happening to you? Trump: I have studied assassinations... they always go for the most impactful people, like Abraham Lincoln. They don’t go after the ones who don’t do much. We have done a lot.
text_zh: 记者：你为什么认为这种事不断发生在你身上？特朗普：我研究过暗杀……他们总是针对最有影响力的人，比如亚伯拉罕·林肯。他们不会去针对那些没什么作为的人。我们做了很多事。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump reassured that the hall for the WHCD was very secure. "The room was very, very secure. You know, he charged from 50 yards away. So he was very far away from the room. And what do think you saw the video of how fast he was running?…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump says that security personnel had their guns drawn as the shooter presented a threat. "those guys, they had their guns drawn literally by the time he was there. They were shooting. That's right. They were very impressive. I thought they were very impressive. I and if I didn't, I'd let you know." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普保证白宫记者协会晚宴的大厅非常安全。‘房间非常、非常安全。你知道，他从50码外冲过来。所以他离房间非常远。你觉得你看到了他跑得有多快的视频吗？……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，当枪手构成威胁时，安保人员已经拔出了枪。‘那些家伙，在他到达那里时，他们确实已经拔出了枪。他们在射击。没错。他们非常令人印象深刻。我认为他们非常令人印象深刻。如果我不这么认为，我会让你知道的。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: I was all set to really rip it. I said to my people, “This would be the most inappropriate speech ever made,” so I have to save it. I think I am going to be nice and boring the next time.
text_zh: 特朗普：我本来准备大干一场。我对我的团队说：“这将是有史以来最不合适的演讲”，所以我必须留着它。我想下次我会表现得友善且无聊一点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump says he feels honoured to have been targeted so many times. "And when you look at the people that have either whether it was an attempt or a successful attempt, and they're very impactful people. Just take a look at the names here.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump reassured that the hall for the WHCD was very secure. "The room was very, very secure. You know, he charged from 50 yards away. So he was very far away from the room. And what do think you saw the video of how fast he was running? He was moving. He was really moving. And the reaction time was great." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，他很荣幸能多次成为目标。‘当你看看那些无论是未遂还是成功的人，他们都是非常有影响力的人。看看这里的名字……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普保证白宫记者协会晚宴的大厅非常安全。‘房间非常、非常安全。你知道，他从50码外冲过来。所以他离房间非常远。你觉得你看到了他跑得有多快的视频吗？他跑得很快。他真的跑得很快。反应时间很棒。’ @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Trump identifies shooter as Cole Thomas Allen, from California, who was armed with multiple weapons. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普确认枪手为来自加利福尼亚州的科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen），他携带了多件武器。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has released a security camera video showing Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the suspected shooter at tonight’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner, attempting to run past law enforcement and U.S. Secret Service Agents. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普发布了一段监控录像，显示今晚白宫记者协会晚宴的嫌疑枪手，31岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen），试图冲过执法人员和美国特勤局特工。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048232009521062075/video/1 推文
